EF1 tornado with estimated 107 mph peak winds. 200 yard width with a 7.5 mile path length ending at 4:37 am 4 ENE of Eureka. Majority of the damage was large trees that were snapped or uprooted.
Tornado spotted 2 miles southeast of Eureka, also saw power flashes. Relayed by Greenwood County Emergency Management.

EF2 tornado with estimated 118 mph peak winds. 116 yard width with a 2.7 mile path length, ending at 7:42 am 3 SE of Virgil. Most severe damage was to steel purlins that were bent along with a large outbuilding being ripped from its sturdy foundation.
